summary: Iter 6: Hermes Ultra v1.3.0 (LangGraph supervisor->hermes->tools->human_approval) backend testing. 17/17 pytest green. Coverage: 5 endpoint tests for POST /api/hermes/ultra (basic assistant, read_only iter=1 cap, controlled_automation critical-action gate, session_id continuity via MemorySaver checkpointer, invalid autonomy fallback to 'assistant'), 5 regression tests (POST /api/hermes/chat v1.2.0, POST /api/hermes/daily-digest, GET /api/hermes/health, GET /api/requests, POST /api/chat), 7 unit tests for tool layer (_extract_tool_calls JSON-block parser w/ 3 variants, tools_node create_task with real MongoDB persistence verification, 5 stub tools mock=true contract, 2 real tools no-mock contract, ultra->memory.append_message session persistence).
critical_code_review_comments: nxt8_langgraph_ultra.py:_router — correct logic: read_only short-circuits after 1 hermes iteration; controlled_automation routes to human_approval when critical tools pending and not approved; MAX_ITER=3 prevents loops. Verified by tests.
_extract_tool_calls regex uses DOTALL+IGNORECASE and unknown tools are filtered against HERMES_TOOLS dict — safe. Tested with 3 fixtures (single, multiple, unknown).
hermes_max_tools_and_coo.py: stub tools correctly tagged mock=True (5 tools). evaluate_action_roi tries roi_agent.assess_action_impact first then stubs — acceptable.
tools_node sets args.setdefault('company_id', company_id) — good multi-tenant safety. Verified task persisted with company_id='TEST_co_ultra' + source='hermes' in MongoDB.

server.py /api/hermes/ultra endpoint: try/except around run_nxt8_ultra returns 200 with success=false on error (graceful). memory.append_message hooks for both user+assistant turns; verified session has both roles in MongoDB.

Ultra LangGraph compiled with InMemorySaver (langgraph 1.2.0). Backend logs show 'Ultra LangGraph compiled (MAX_ITER=3)' on startup. Confirmed by session_continuity test — same thread_id reused across 2 calls.
v1.2.0 enhanced_chat (/api/hermes/chat with 4 tools) NOT regressed — daily-digest also passes. Hermes gateway offline as expected (preview), DeepSeek fallback works.
Minor: HERMES_TOOLS dispatch in tools_node passes args dict directly; if LLM emits malformed args (non-dict), would raise. Currently caught in try/except returning ok:false — acceptable.
Minor: pytest-asyncio was not installed previously; added for these unit tests (--asyncio-mode=auto). Backend runtime unaffected.

Minor (test-side, fixed): motor's AsyncIOMotorClient caches its event loop. For direct unit tests against MongoDB we reset core.db._client/_db before each async test to rebind to the test loop. Not a production concern (server uses a single uvloop).
seed_data_creation: Tests insert ephemeral TEST_-prefixed tasks via create_task tool (TEST_co_ultra company_id) and TEST_-prefixed sessions via /api/hermes/ultra. Idempotent /api/seed not re-run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hermes Ultra v1.3.0 fully functional. Endpoint: POST /api/hermes/ultra {message, company_id, user_id, session_id, autonomy_level: read_only|assistant|controlled_automation}. Response: {success, content, autonomy_level, thread_id, iterations, confidence, tool_traces:[], requires_human_approval, fallback?}. LangGraph supervisor->hermes->tools->human_approval, MAX_ITER=3, MemorySaver checkpointer keyed by thread_id=session_id. Tool dispatch via HERMES_TOOLS dict (10 tools, 5 real + 5 stubs mock=true). LLM (DeepSeek :free) is non-deterministic about emitting ```json {tool,args}``` blocks — endpoint tests therefore don't require tool_traces to be populated; unit tests use crafted assistant content via _extract_tool_calls + tools_node directly to verify execution path + MongoDB writes. v1.2.0 endpoints (/api/hermes/chat enhanced, /api/hermes/daily-digest) preserved. To run: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=... pytest backend/tests/test_hermes_ultra.py --asyncio-mode=auto -v
